D1 Optics L3 Apply Reference

Soap Bubble Thin-Film Interference

slide the film thickness from 50 to 1000 nanometres and watch the reflected colour cycle through the structural rainbow

Light reflected from the top and bottom of a thin film interferes — constructively for some wavelengths, destructively for others, painting the bubble in structural colour.

Slide the thickness to sweep the film from too-thin to too-thick. Slide the refractive index to switch between soap, oil, and silicate films.

Reflected colour
—
